title: Minecraft Easy Days
description: A vanilla + modpack dedicated to immersion and slowing down so you can enjoy every little thing and savour the experience.
body:
![Minecraft Easy days logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d33e6eda07fad99e62c7183eef3b2396ada27bb.png)

My goal was to take and my previous mod pack and add a new idea to it, to make you slow down and savour the time you have playing, and ive think ive accomplished that

# Features

- Wooden tools are no more! and have been replaced by flint tools with the early stage mod, further with the early stage mod you can no longer punch down trees, you MUST use a axe
- The levelZ mod is a prominent part of this modpack, forcing you to slow down and gradually progress through the game, just take your time and relax, the games not going anywhere ;P
- Before iron there is a new stage! copper gear have been added and will allow you to have some form of protection before unlocking iron gear with the levelz mod
- Pretty much all generation has been overhauled to be better with larger naturally generating trees and structers
- Using the Antique atlas mod you will be able to use a map along your journey! feal like a 1500s adventourer joting down the map in a book as you explore and mark structers or places of interest
- Many quality of life improvements such as storage/inventory sorting (press 3rd mouse button/mouse wheel to use), a bag to hold more items, being able to crawl on command (use by pressing Z), being able to zoom (use by holding down C), item animations, ambient sounds, a slight gui improvement,
- Sleeping instead of skipping to day time, speeds up time instead, crops will grow, ore will smelt and food will be cooked
- a revamped nether and end dimension complete with new structers and biomes and a new way to get to the end, by exploring and finding 12 special eyes, curtesy of the end revamped mod

Theres so many features and new things that i cant possible fit them all here so please explore and experiment, if you struggle finding out how to craft any of the new items please use the REI to search for any crafting recipes

This is my seccond attempt at making a full modpack, which i hope you all enjoy playing, i reccomend using all of the inculded resource packs for the game to be as enjoyable as possible but its only a suggestion

All credit goes to the creators of the mods ive used in this modpack, it wouldnt have been possible if we didnt have them <3

For any issues please join my discord sever and find the Issues tab and then create a post, ill try to reply and fix/solve any problems you have as quick as im able too, but please be paitent i am also a human being <3
